folio.label: 135v
folio.l: Dotú as ©ow list , haue ©owre bihest in mynde
For quykke or ded , rigút there ©e shal me fynde
In ©ow litú al , to do me lyue or deye
But wel I woot , the Rokkes ben a weye
He taketú his leue , and she astoned stode
In al hire face , nas a drope of bloode
She wend neuäe han come , in swicú a trappe
¢ Allas q¶ she , that euäe this shulde happe
For wende I neuäe , by possibilitee
That suche a moastre , or merueille mygút be
It is a geyns , the ¸cesse of nature
And home she gotú , a sorweful creature
For verrey fere , vnethe may she goo
She wepeth weyletú , al a day or two
And swougúnetú , that it reuthe was to se
But why it was , to no wygút told she
For ougút of toune , was goon Arueragus
But to hire self she spak , and seide thus
Witú face pale , and witú ful sorweful chere
In hire compleynte , as ©e shuln after heere
Allas q¶ she , oon the fortune , I pleyne
That vnwar , wrapped hast me , in thy cheyne
Fro whicú to escape , woot I no socoure
Saue oonly detú , or ellis dishonoure
Oon of theise two , bihouetú me to chese
But nathelees , ©et haue I leuere to lese
My lyf , than of my body haue a shame
Or knowe my seluen false , or lese my name
And witú my detú , I may be quyte I wys
Hatú there nat , many a noble wyf er this
And many a mayde , I slayn hire self , allas
Rather than witú hire body , do trespas
¢ ñis certes , lo æeise stories beren wytnesse
Whan thretty Tyrauntez , ful of cursednesse
Had slayn Phidon , in Athenes atte feste
They comaunded his dougútren , fort arreste
And bryngen hem biforn hi~ , in despit
Al naked , to fulfille here foul delit
And in here fadres blod , they mad hem daunce
Vp on the pauement , god ©eue he~ myschaunce
For whicú theise wooful maydenes , ful of drede
Rathere than they wold lese , here maydenhede
They pryuely ben stirt , in to a welle
And dreynt hem seluen , as the bookes telle
¢ They of Metene , lete enquere and seke
Of Lacedomye , fifty maydenes eke
